Our Story

A Taste of Real Aruba

Welcome to The Pastechi House — the heart of authentic Aruban street food right in the center of Oranjestad. We are passionate about bringing you the real flavors of the island, one golden pastry at a time.

A pastechi is a traditional Aruban fried pastry — a flaky, golden shell filled with delicious savory fillings. This beloved local snack has been part of island life for generations, enjoyed for breakfast, lunch, or any time you need a true taste of home.

Paired with our handcrafted smoothies, milkshakes, and refreshing frappes, every visit is a full Caribbean experience. Come hungry, leave happy!

What People Say

Guest Reviews

★★★★★

"Absolutely the best pastechi on the island! The cheese filling is perfectly seasoned and the pastry is so crispy. Been coming here every morning for years. This is real Aruban food at its finest!"

— Maria V.  ·  Google Review
★★★★★

"If you visit Aruba and do not stop at The Pastechi House, did you even really visit? The smoothies are incredible and the beef pastechi is out of this world. My whole family loves this place!"

— Carlos M.  ·  TripAdvisor
★★★★★

"Stumbled upon this place on our first day and came back every single day after. The crab pastechi is unique and absolutely delicious. Friendly staff, amazing food, great prices!"

— Sarah K.  ·  Google Review
★★★★☆

"Food is genuinely delicious — no complaints there. The pastechi are always fresh and hot. Can get a little busy during peak hours so expect a short wait, but totally worth it!"

— Dave R.  ·  Yelp
★★★☆☆

"The food is great, especially the pastechis. Only wish the seating area was a bit bigger. On busy days it can feel crowded. That said, the flavors make it all worthwhile — will keep coming back!"

— Anonymous  ·  Google Review
★★★★★

"The milkshakes here are incredible! Paired with a chicken pastechi — the perfect combo. Staff is super warm and welcoming. So much local charm. A true must-visit in Oranjestad!"

— Yolanda B.  ·  Facebook
